messages.text:
BL-514 — Retro-ticket the remote-control health/respawn operator tooling (landed un-ticketed via 7dd4d14e; KEEP, already tested) and wire the RC health check into `./swarm ensure`
What it solves: SCOPE NOTE — this is FORK / OPERATOR-SUBSTRATE tooling, not Milestone-1 extension product. It lives
under swarmforge/scripts/ (the maintained fork) and supervises the swarm's remote-control
(claude.ai/code) sessions; project.prompt keeps watchdog/heartbeat OUT of the EXTENSION MVP, but
this is subs…
Approval context: Retro-ticketing the remote-control health/respawn tooling that landed on main WITHOUT a ticket (commit 7dd4d14e, an ancestor of BL-506's approved commit) — the constitution requires such un-ticketed work to be retroactively ticketed or reverted, and the coordinator directed KEEP because it is real,…
BL-514 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-514" (or "reject BL-514 <reason>") to act.
